title: Meeka Reen
content:
{{Top|fa|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:MeekaReen-DKD.png]] |name=Meeka Reen |homeworld= |birth= |death=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Jerne]]"[[Dark Knight's Devilry]]" depicts [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] using his [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|father's lightsaber]], which he gained in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and lost in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. As ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates ''A New Hope''{{'s}} end to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and ''The Empire Strikes Back'' to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], "Dark Knight's Devilry," which includes the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Meeka Reen on [[Jerne]], must take place between those two [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{StoryCite|story=Dark Knight's Devilry|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Meeka Reen's pirates]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The leader of this rat pack is a not-so-nice young lady called… Meeka Reen.|Princess Leia Organa|}} '''Meeka Reen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] leader of insurgent [[Meeka Reen's pirates|forces]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jerne]]. Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], she encountered two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who revealed to her the whereabouts of an ancient [[Eternity Crystal|crystal]] that could supposedly control [[Time/Legends|time]]. Reen pretended to be skeptical of Skywalker's story, but in reality, she was intrigued at the amount of power the [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] would give its user. She allowed a mission to the location of the crystal, [[Adony Station]], to be undertaken. After encountering and defeating a number of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], Reen, her [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], and the Rebels found the location of the vault containing the crystal. Reen then turned on Skywalker and Organa, intending on taking the crystal for herself. However, when she entered the vault, a pre-planted [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] exploded, [[Death/Legends|killing]] her and her gang. ==Biography== ===Interrogating the Rebels=== {{Quote|What! No one's going anywhere ''near'' Adony Station until I know exactly what we're after.|Meeka Reen|}} [[File:Meeka1.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Meeka Reen was skeptical that Luke Skywalker intended to go to Adony Station.]] Meeka Reen was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the leader of a [[Meeka Reen's pirates|gang]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jerne]]. Despite her forces rebelling against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], they did not ally themselves with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].{{CSWECite|III|89|Reen, Meeka}} At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], a group of her pirates [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]] the Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. They brought the pair to Reen, who told them that she would deal with them later but first wanted to know what had happened to the Imperial [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ryko Vant]], whom she considered to be scum. One of her crew responded that he had escaped and, by that [[Time/Legends|time]], had likely gotten back to [[Jerne City H.Q.]] Reen then turned her attention to the Rebels, who explained that they were planning to [[Mission to Jerne|head]] toward [[Adony Station]]. Reen was surprised that they intended to go there as the location had nothing but an Imperial outpost and even lacked a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. It was then that [[Skutch]], one of Reen's gang members, noticed that Skywalker's [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], had an [[Homing beacon/Legends|electronic trace]] on him, leading Reen to order him to quickly remove it and subsequently tell Skywalker that he had some explaining to do or else she would get rid of him as well. Skywalker then gave his explanation as to why he needed Reen's help to get to Adony Station: he claimed that a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] prior, the Rebels had discovered a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] with [[Data-tape/Legends|image tapes]] that revealed an object of importance to the Rebel Alliance was located at the station. [[File:Meeka4.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Reen had no intention of helping the Rebels.]] He tried to end his story there, but Reen did not allow it, proclaiming that no one would approach Adony Station until she knew what the Alliance was seeking. Skywalker then relented once he saw a [[Security guard/Legends|guard]] raising a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to Organa's head, further explaining that the tapes had revealed the existence of an artifact known as the [[Eternity Crystal]] that had the ability to wind time backward and have it flow forwards again from whenever the user chose. With a laid-back posture, Reen pretended she did not believe him in the slightest, but internally, she was intrigued, theorizing that such a [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] could make her [[Emperor/Legends|empress]] of the [[Universe/Legends|universe]]. She then told Skywalker that she would give him a chance, but she threatened that if his story was false, his punishment would be [[Death/Legends|death]]. To herself, Reen thought Skywalker would end up dead anyway, for she was not going to let such an opportunity slip away. ===Investigating Adony=== {{Quote|It's open! One small charge did it! Ha! Let's go!|Meeka Reen|}} [[File:Meeka2.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Reen following her victory]] With the new [[Standard day/Legends|day]], the guerrillas and Rebels gathered supplies for the attack. When Reen noticed Skywalker taking his [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]], she asked Skutch to keep an [[Eye/Legends|eye]] on him. The heavily armed party of twenty then departed, with Reen making sure that everyone was aboard the [[Skimmer/Legends|skimmers]]. Reen and Skywalker went to scout the Imperial outpost at the station, with both of them noticing that it did not look to be reinforced as they expected. The whole group then traveled down, and Reen noted her sense of apprehension about the situation. At that point, the Imperials [[Lightfight|opened fire]], and Skywalker shouted for everyone to return fire. The guerrillas took damage, with Reen ordering for them to keep pouring on the [[Laser/Legends|laserfire]] and to move in on [[Limb/Legends|foot]] while scattering. After the brief skirmish, Reen celebrated their victory, calling it an easy win. Skywalker was surprised at her comment, for she had lost six of her men, but Reen felt that they had meant nothing: she drew attention to the fact that both Skywalker and Organa had survived the ordeal, which allowed them to find the vault. The remaining individuals then moved on to the ancient ruins, with Organa noting the location's familiarity. Reen then retrieved [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]] from Skutch. As Skywalker inspected the ruins, Reen kicked up some dirt, complaining that the place had nothing but stones and dust. Organa then announced that a symbol on the door matched the one from the tapes. [[File:Meeka5.jpg|thumb|right|235px|Reen preparing to enter]] Once Reen heard her, she determined that the two Rebels were no longer necessary, so she ordered them to drop their guns and stand away from the site with Skutch, who she had to make sure that they would cause no trouble. She planned to [[Ransom/Legends|ransom]] the pair to the highest bidder. Reen directed one of her pirates to give her a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] in order to blast the door open. Once that was completed, she and her band went inside. As Reen speculated what could be inside the vault, she asked for someone to bring her a light, but a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] that had been planted earlier by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]—intended for Skywalker and Organa—then exploded, killing Reen and her pirates; there was no crystal at Adony Station, for the whole incident had been a trap set up by Vader. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|We've done it! And it was so easy.''"
"''Not that easy… you lost six men.''"
"''Forget them… they were nothing.|Meeka Reen and Luke Skywalker|}} [[File:Meeka3.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Meeka Reen intended to kill Luke Skywalker if his story turned out to be false.]] Leia Organa considered Reen to be a not-nice individual, worrying prior to her encounter with the gang leader. Reen thought of Imperials such as Captain Vant as scum, and she felt that Adony Station's lack of a cantina made it an uninteresting location. When she discovered that Luke Skywalker had a story to tell, she was willing to threaten him at gunpoint until he revealed all of the details. After the Rebel was done speaking, Reen pretended to not believe him while internally being excited at the prospects of his tale. She subsequently let him "convince" her to give the plan a chance, continuing to threaten him with death all the while and holding his chin while doing so. When Reen lost six of her men to the Empire, it was of little concern to her as she considered them to be worthless. She continued to focus on getting to the vault, even mistakenly letting slip her plans, saying that she alone intended to find it instead of the whole group. Once the entrance was found, she executed her double-cross, having the Rebels taken away by Skutch. Reen had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], blue eyes, and fair skin. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Give me one of those grenades!|Meeka Reen|}} Meeka Reen wore brown [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] and [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] that utilized a [[Cape/Legends|cape]] along with a gold-colored jacket. She also donned a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]], brown [[Boot/Legends|boots]], gold-colored [[Piercing/Legends|earrings]], and a gold-colored headband. She used a blaster to fight off the stormtroopers and proton grenades to enter the ancient vault. ==Behind the scenes== Meeka Reen first appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] "[[Dark Knight's Devilry]]," which was written by [[Steve Moore]], illustrated by [[Alan Davis]], and first published in [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|153rd issue]] of ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly]]'' in [[January]] [[1982]].''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 3]]'' ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Dark Knight's Devilry|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Meeka Reen}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Reen, Meeka}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Meeka Reen's pirates]]
